items.title: Open-Source DCU Edge Architecture & Wi-SUN Mesh Stack for Africa
items.summary: An industrial audit of ARM hardware platforms (Allwinner, BeagleBone, CM4), smart meter radio transceivers, Linux driver strategies (G3-PLC, wsbrd), and open HES architectures (EMQX, Gurux DLMS, ThingsBoard, MicroPowerManager) replacing proprietary EAC/DINA middleware.

items.title: OpenAMI Nigeria Strategic Expansion: Technical Reference Design & NERC 2023 Rules
items.summary: An authoritative regulatory strategy and technical reference design blueprint aligning the OpenAMI smart metering stack with the newly-active 2023 NERC Nigeria Mini-Grid regulations. Details isolated/interconnected permit systems, direct community agreements, and MYTO loss cap compliance mapping.
items.isvRelevance: Direct ISV/OpenAMI expansion playbook for Nigeria and SSA regulatory contexts tied to IEEE Smart Village mini-grid programs.

items.title: OpenAMI & IEEE Smart Village: Pan-African Capital Raising & Strategic Pitch Blueprint
items.summary: A comprehensive fundraising prospectus applying H.R. Moody's 22 Laws of Fund-Raising to the OpenAMI smart-metering and ISV off-grid mini-grid expansion. Details target donor mapping, a 4-stage execution roadmap, value propositions, and emotional narrative positioning.
items.isvRelevance: Capital-raising framework for ISV portfolio growth and OpenAMI scale-out across Africa.

items.title: UN ECE Interoperability Guidelines: Open-Source & Hybrid Models in Mini-Grid Context
items.summary: A comprehensive policy synthesis of the 2025 UNECE guidelines on energy system digitalization. Analyzes GridWise interoperability dimensions, SGAM layers, open-source PAYG tokens, hybrid software models, and edge registries.
items.isvRelevance: Policy anchor for ISV interoperability work across metering, PAYG, and hybrid control systems.

items.title: OpenAMI Technical Reference Design: Interoperable Smart Metering, Wi-SUN Mesh, & Grid Code Audits
items.summary: A detailed technical reference design for OpenAMI, synthesizing the IHM-4000 hardware architecture, Wi-SUN mesh topology, 7 core use cases, 7-layer OSI & 5-layer SGAM mappings, and Earth Leakage life-safety limits.
items.isvRelevance: Core OpenAMI engineering spec for Tech Comm metering topology, NAN redundancy, and field deployment standards.

items.title: The Decentralized Energy Nexus: Solar Mini-Grids & Bioenergy Policies
items.summary: A comprehensive policy synthesis of the CSE 2026 Bioenergy Report and Mini-Grid Monetisation Framework. Explores the CapEx-OpEx imbalance, JREDA beneficiary data, and the circular solar-biomass-eATV nexus.
items.isvRelevance: Connects ISV energy access programs to broader mini-grid finance and productive-use mobility.

items.title: Prepaid Metering & NERC Regulations: Auditing Equity & Grid Arrival in SSA
items.summary: Analysis of NERC 2023 Regulations and the AFUR Tariff Tool mandate standardizing loss caps and grid arrival exit strategies—and why OpenAMI prepaid metering is the critical audit link to prevent exploitation.
items.isvRelevance: Regulatory context for STS/prepaid paths and metering topology work in SSA operator fleets.

items.title: EPRI Smart Grid Open-Source Stacks: Maturity Audit & Hardening Specification
items.summary: An extensive code and protocol audit of epri-dev/DLMS-COSEM, dlms-access-point, and OpenDER libraries. Focuses on missing interface classes (Profiles, Disconnects), high-level security suites, optical eye optical handshakes for Calin/Hexing meters, and physical DCU access point requirements including local WAL cache, Wi-SUN FAN RF drivers, watchdogs, and A/B partition OTA updates.

items.title: Filtered AI Architecture & OPAI Use-Case Matrix
items.summary: An extensive code and protocol audit of the EPRI / LF Energy Open Power AI Consortium (OPAI) research repository. Isolates critical assets and synthesizes target multi-model architectures (SolarNet, Quartz, PowerNet) for rural grid deployment.

items.title: Power Quality (PQ) Management in Decentralized Mini-Grids
items.summary: A deep technical specification for managing phase unbalance and harmonic distortion. Integrates software-driven Python-OpenDSS phase balancing routines, edge-level active asymmetric inverter control loops (3P4W) driven by Fledge/OpenFMB, Delta-Wye transformer triplen traps, and EPRI Grid-IQ OS-HEM resonance spectrogram auditing.

items.title: Mini-Grid Dynamic Capacity & AI-Driven Optimization Specification
items.summary: An engineering specification for rural solar-plus-storage mini-grids. Evaluates conductor oversizing and software-driven AAR forecasts for Dynamic Thermal Line capacities. Details Volt/VAR feeder optimization along with advanced AI operations: AIWP lead-acid battery protection and co-located edge AI inference compute nodes acting as productive solar-absorption loads.

items.title: Combined Cooling & Heating Heat Pump (CCHHP) for Rural Post-Harvest Agro-Processing
items.summary: An engineering specification of CCHHP systems utilizing Copeland Scroll technology and water-ice PCM thermal batteries for decentralized 1kL (2x500L) dairy cold chains and crop dehydration. Evaluates Promethean, Inficold, Tessol, and InspiraFarms, with a full 10-year TCO model and rural grid compatibility analysis.

items.title: SSA Mini-Grid Downtime: Cloud Lock-In & Edge Topology
items.summary: Root cause anatomy of 4-day+ mini-grid outages across Sub-Saharan Africa — SMS infrastructure vulnerabilities, iron-roof RF attenuation, cloud-synchronous AMI brittleness, STS key access mechanisms, and how EPRI's open-source wisund + OpenDER + OpenDSS stack eliminates every single point of failure.

items.title: MicroPowerManager: Architectural & Regulatory Critique
items.summary: A rigorous technical audit of MPM's systemic deficiencies: perimeter-only security vs. cryptographic audit chains, NERC compliance exposure, split-brain STS token generation risks, mobile money payment chain failures, and missing power quality telemetry — with 8 specific open-source integration recommendations.

items.title: Motrike TrikeXplor E-Truck Design Analysis & Upgrade Roadmap
items.summary: Roll cage structural deficiencies, traction loss analysis, A-arm suspension upgrade path (Gabriel, Uno Minda), UTV-grade hydraulic braking, and full Bill of Materials for safety & durability improvements.
items.isvRelevance: Emerging-market mobility engineering reference for productive-use vehicle programs adjacent to ISV field logistics.

items.title: eATV MiniGrid Nexus SSA + South Asia Expansion Pitch
items.summary: Integrated eATV + solar MiniGrid model for rural last-mile logistics and energy access across Sub-Saharan Africa and South Asia (India, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka). Includes V2G architecture, PAYG finance, and 5-year financial projections.
items.isvRelevance: Productive-use anchor model linking ISV energy access to rural mobility and revenue.

items.title: Electric Cargo Vehicles as Productive-Use Anchors for SSA
items.summary: Scored comparison of 7 electric cargo vehicles evaluated specifically for off-grid mini-grid programs across Sub-Saharan Africa. Includes fleet stack model, performance scoring, and procurement checklist.
items.isvRelevance: Vehicle selection framework for ISV sites evaluating productive-use electrification alongside mini-grids.

items.title: Prepaid Metering & STS Standard: Legacy Key Management in SSA
items.summary: Formal correspondence to the STS Association (STSA), IEC working groups, and meter manufacturers requesting legacy algorithm recognition, self-management rights, and dedicated KMC access pathways.
items.isvRelevance: Directly supports Tech Comm STS/legacy hardware discussion (~64% legacy fleets) and token path interoperability.

items.title: Circles of Power: Village Metering Economics & Open DER Stack
items.summary: Field problem framing from the 2025 Open Energy Hackathon: prepaid meters at $600–$1,500 can nearly double mini-grid CAPEX; villages need per-customer metering, theft detection, billing, and protocol translation (SunSpec/MQTT) below the distribution feeder. Documents pole-mount EMS prototypes and includes a Stonehenge topology metaphor as one modeling aid.
items.isvRelevance: Sets the economic and interoperability case behind Tech Comm metering work, Street Pole EMS, and OpenAMI — the metaphor is optional; the problems are not.

reportCodeGuide.summary: Report IDs follow {Series}-{Type}-{Number}. The series names the program area; the type names the document kind; the number is a serial within that series-type.
